content:
🌙 **AFTER-HOURS GAPS (v7.8)** — July 2, 2026
✅ Tool health: TV MCP / AH digest / Finviz / EDGAR all live. ⚠️ AH volume thin/unverified on all 3 gappers (🟡).

🚨 **Theme-wide breakdown:** DRAM -10.39% + SNDK -16.31% = real memory-chip unwind
🚨 **Theme-wide breakout:** GDX +3.98% / GDXJ +4.81% / SLV +3.17% (juniors leading = real metals move)
🚨 **Theme-wide breakout:** SHLD +5.63% + ITA +2.05% = defense tech sector-wide

**TOP AH GAPPERS**
• AHCO -7.06% | $1.43B | Confirmed 8-K: Material Cybersecurity Incident (Item 1.05) | thin vol 🟡
• TARS +5.58% | $2.82B | Unconfirmed — likely short-cover bounce off Jul1 Culper short report | thin vol 🟡
• ENRD +6.64% | $1.18B | Unconfirmed — thin-float SPAC noise | thin vol 🟡

**8-Ks:** LEU (-3.42%, $900M DOE HALEU deal, sold the news) · NVDA (EVP hire, non-material) · TSLA (-6.65%, Q2 delivery beat 480K vs 406K est, margin concerns; AH flat, earnings Jul 22)

**WATCHLIST:** SNDK -16.31% (memory breakdown) | COIN +12.47% | PLTR +7.71% | MARA -9.75% (WGMI miners theme -12.49%)

**Tomorrow (Fri Jul3, pre-holiday half day):** earnings calendar unverified — check manually. Bias: rotational (value/defensive > growth/semis), not risk-off (VIX -5.67%).

🔗 Full report: https://nkuy36.github.io/trading-dashboards/after-hours-scan-2026-07-02.html
